title: Admin Moderation Tools — Delete/Hide/Restore/Promote/Demote/Ban
summary: Owners and admins now see a full moderation panel in the 3-dots menu on any group-chat message. Adds Hide Message (invisible to members, admins keep seeing it), Restore Message (un-delete or un-hide), Promote/Demote to admin (owner only), and permanent Ban User that writes to bans.json and blocks re-entry.

changes.description: Admins and the room owner now see a dedicated moderation section in the 3-dots (⋮) menu for every message that is NOT their own. The section appears only in group rooms (not DMs).

🙈 Hide from Chat: marks the message hidden=true in the cell JSON. Non-admin members can no longer see the message. Admins continue to see it with a yellow '🙈 Hidden from chat (admin view only)' banner. A system notification is not injected (silent moderation).
♻️ Restore Message: available on any deleted OR hidden message. Clears deleted/hidden/deletedBy/hiddenBy fields and writes restoredBy + restoredAt. The message reappears for all members immediately.

🛡️ Promote to Admin / 📉 Demote Admin: available to the room owner only. Reads the current adminUids from the roles cache and toggles. Updates member record + admins.json and invalidates the roles cache so the change is reflected immediately.

⛔ Ban User: available to admins and owner (not shown if target is the owner). Confirms with a danger dialog, then writes to rooms-meta/{room}/bans.json, removes the member record, removes the room from the target's rooms list, and injects a system message '@user was banned'.

Ban enforcement in _doJoinRoom: before any UI is shown, bans.json is fetched. If the current user's UID appears in the list the join is aborted (currentRoom=null, running=false) and a persistent error toast '⛔ You are banned from this room' is shown.

createMessageElement now performs a synchronous admin check (using _roomRolesCache). Admins always see hidden messages (with yellow banner) and deleted messages (with red banner + original text), even when showDeletedDisclosure=false. Bubble gets admin-hidden-msg or admin-deleted-visible class for visual distinction.

Added .msg-hidden-admin-banner (yellow), .msg-hidden-admin-banner.deleted-banner (red), .msg.admin-hidden-msg (amber left-border, 75% opacity), .msg.admin-deleted-visible (red left-border, 70% opacity) styles.
Added roomBansPath = room => `rooms-meta/${room}/bans.json` alongside existing roomMemberPath / roomAdminsPath.
